one_time_description: CMHC Special Contribution of $1,000,000 not in budget and not present in prior year
economic_notes: Nation holds 25% ownership in Hayu Fishing Limited Partnership and Hayu Fishing Ltd., accounted for under modified equity method. Nation also receives BCFN Gaming revenue.
notes: ISC funding not separately identified; Nuu-chah-nulth Tribal Council ($3,347,618) and Government of Canada ($595,650) are likely federal transfers routed through tribal council. Total government transfers estimated as NTC + Province of BC + CMHC + CMHC Special Contribution + FNESC + Government of Canada. OSR estimated as remaining revenue lines. Nation Business Entities excluded from consolidation. Two entities (Hayu Fishing LP and Hayu Fishing Ltd.) accounted for under modified equity method at 25% ownership each. Restricted cash reserves noted as not adequately funded at year end. Prior year accumulated surplus on balance sheet shows $30,362,505 but Statement of Changes shows beginning balance of $30,362,506 - minor rounding discrepancy in source document.
